No calibrated fitness summary, workout-plan, training-response, injury-risk, recovery, VO2 max, supplement, sport-selection, medical-clearance, or ancestry applicability model is supplied with this fixture.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A derived ACTN3 rs1815739 CT call is available. This is educational trait context only and does not predict talent, strength, speed, endurance, training response, or athletic ability.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: ACTN3 is one of the best-studied genes in athletic-performance research, but a single marker cannot define a training plan or performance outcome.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A derived ACE ID context row is available. This is not enough to choose sports, prescribe workouts, estimate VO2 max, recommend supplements, or predict training response.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: ACE is discussed in athletic-performance research, but training history, health, sleep, nutrition, environment, opportunity, and many other factors remain important.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: No calibrated fitness summary, workout-plan, training-response, injury-risk, recovery, VO2 max, supplement, sport-selection, medical-clearance, or ancestry applicability model is supplied with this fixture.
resultRows.sourceLabel: NHGRI polygenic risk scores / GWAS Catalog
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The report can summarize supplied marker context, but it should not personalize workouts, sport choices, supplements, injury risk, recovery, or performance expectations without a validated model.

trainerContext: Use this report as educational fitness genetics context to discuss with qualified trainers or health professionals, not as a workout plan.
Base exercise programming on goals, current fitness, health status, training history, recovery, and professional assessment.
Do not use genotype alone for sport selection, supplement decisions, injury-risk estimates, recovery estimates, VO2 max estimates, or medical exercise clearance.

references.title: NHGRI overview of polygenic risk scores

missingInputs: Authenticated sample-report sections and rows have not been extracted.

No calibrated fitness summary, workout-plan, training-response, injury-risk, recovery, VO2 max, supplement, sport-selection, medical-clearance, or ancestry applicability model is supplied with this fixture.
No training history, injury history, sleep, nutrition, medical history, fitness testing, coach assessment, or clinician assessment is supplied.
uncertainty: Fitness and training outcomes are complex traits influenced by genetics, training history, health, sleep, nutrition, environment, opportunity, age, and many other factors.
A small number of markers cannot explain talent, injury risk, recovery, supplement response, training response, or sport suitability.
limitations: This validation result uses derived evidence only; raw genome data is not included.

The report is educational and does not create workouts, prescribe training, recommend sport selection, estimate injury risk, estimate recovery, quantify VO2 max, recommend supplements, or provide medical exercise clearance.
Authenticated Sequencing.com sample report rows are still pending.
